subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of Abdul Baha: It is now three years that, like unto a nestless and shelterless bird, I have been wandering through mountains and plains and flying over the wilderness and Sahara.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان عزیز عبدالبهاء سه سال است که مانند مرغ بی لانه و آشیانه سرگشته کوه و
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
